page: Microsoft Azure M24ds_v3 is a memory-optimized virtual machine belonging to the MDSMediumMemoryv3 family. Built on the x86_64 CPU architecture, this server features 24 dedicated vCPUs and a substantial memory capacity of 480.0 GB, yielding a high memory-to-core ratio of 20.0 GB per vCPU. The virtualization layer is managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor.

For local storage needs, the instance is equipped with a 410 GB local disk and is Premium Storage capable, allowing integration with high-performance persistent storage volumes. The configuration does not include any integrated GPUs or complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the M24ds_v3 is designed for workloads requiring high memory density relative to compute resources, reducing the need to over-provision vCPUs simply to acquire sufficient RAM. This resource profile is highly suitable for large-scale in-memory databases, enterprise relational database management systems, heavy data caching layers, and memory-intensive enterprise resource planning applications.
description: Microsoft Azure M24ds_v3 is a memory-optimized virtual machine from the MDSMediumMemoryv3 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 24 dedicated vCPUs on an x86_64 architecture and provides 480.0 GB of system memory, establishing a high allocation of 20.0 GB of RAM per core. The instance includes 410 GB of local storage and supports Premium Storage for high-throughput disk configurations, though it lacks integrated GPUs and complimentary public IPv4 addresses. This server is engineered for memory-intensive workloads where RAM capacity is the primary bottleneck. It offers qualitative cost efficiency by allowing organizations to scale memory resources without paying for unnecessary compute cores. The M24ds_v3 is highly suited for hosting large in-memory databases, enterprise relational databases, extensive caching layers, and complex data processing applications.
og_description: Microsoft Azure M24ds_v3 is a memory-optimized virtual machine featuring 24 dedicated vCPUs, 480 GB of RAM, and 410 GB of local storage, designed for large-scale database and in-memory workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure M24ds_v3 is a memory-optimized VM with 24 dedicated vCPUs, 480 GB RAM, and 410 GB local storage, running on Microsoft Hyper-V.
tagline: A memory-optimized virtual machine featuring high RAM-to-vCPU density and local storage for demanding database and enterprise workloads.
bullet_points: 480.0 GB of system memory providing 20.0 GB per core
410 GB local storage with Premium Storage capability
Optimized for large-scale in-memory databases and caching layers
